label: Stage end trigger (role tag set)
description: Ends the stage when all specified roles have the given pawn tag set.

roleIds.label: Role IDs
roleIds.description: List of role IDs whose assigned pawns must have the tag for this trigger to fire.

clearTag.label: Clear tag
clearTag.description: If true, removes the tag from role pawns when the trigger fires.

tag.label: Tag
tag.description: Pawn tag that must be set on all specified role pawns.
